description.overview: Israel's national dog, the Canaan is an ancient, primitive breed. They're alert, devoted dogs who bond closely with family.
description.history: The Canaan Dog originated in Israel.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, vigilant, devoted.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their double coat, harsh outer coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Israel's national dog, the Canaan is an ancient, primitive breed. They're alert, devoted dogs who bond closely with family.
